title: Manufacturing Engineer - Whirlpool India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Whirlpool India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Whirlpool India are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Whirlpool India:
Whirlpool India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Whirlpool India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
